title: Textiles Committee (Pension and General Provident Fund) Regulations, 1985
description: Textiles Committee (Pension and General Provident Fund) Regulations, 1985
text: PUBLISHED IN THE GAZETTE OF INDIA PART III SECTION 4 ON 16TH FEBRUARY, 1985. TEXTILES COMMITTEE GOVERNMENT OF INDIA (MINISTRY OF COMMERCE) Bombay, 30th January, 1985. S.O.No.94/12/83-AD In exercise of the powers conferred by clause © of sub-section (2) of section 23 of the Textiles Committee Act, 1963 (41) of 1963, the Textiles Committee with the previous sanction of the Central Government hereby makes the following regulations, namely: Short title and commencement 1. (1) These regulations may be called the Textiles Committee (Pension and General Provident Fund) Regulations, 1985. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the official Gazette. Rules etc. governing the Pension and Provident Fund of the employee of Textiles Committee. 2. The provisions of the General Provident Fund (Central Services) rules, 1960, and the Central Civil Services (Pension) Rules, 1972, as amended from time to time, shall apply to all the whole time and regular employees of the Textiles Committee. Provided that the employees who entered into services of the Textiles Committee prior to the date of publication of these regulations in the official Gazette and were governed by the Textiles Committee Contributory Provident Fund Regulations, 1970 shall be given an option to continue to be govern by the said regulations and the Textiles Committee’s Employees (Death –Cum- Retirement Gratuity) Regulations, 1982 and the option shall be exercised by such employees in writing within six months from the date of publication of these regulations, and the option once exercised shall be treated as final. Foot Note: Published in the Gazette of India, Part III, Section 4 dated 16.02.1985. -- 1 of 1 --
